text: happy new year everyone! hope you all had a restful break. excited to kick off 2025 together 🎉
welcome back team! quick reminder — the office fridge got cleaned out over the break so label your stuff. also we have bagels in the kitchen to celebrate the new year.
dude did you watch the playoff game last night? that fourth quarter comeback was insane
yes!! I was screaming at my TV lol. we should grab beers and watch the next one
does anyone know the wifi password for the small conf room on the 3rd floor? I keep getting kicked off
it's BsusGuest2024 — they haven't rotated it yet. should be on the whiteboard in there too
hey quinn, can we push our 2pm sync to 3pm today? I have a dentist appointment that's running late
no worries, 3pm works. hope the dentist isn't too painful 😬
bob have you tried that new ramen place on 5th? I went over the break and it was incredible
no but I've been meaning to! want to go for lunch today? I'm craving something warm, it's freezing out
yes let's do it. 12:30?
lisa did you see that new motion design reel on dribbble? the micro-interactions are so smooth. sending you the link
omg yes that was gorgeous. the easing curves on the card transitions are exactly what I want to learn. thanks for sharing!
heads up — Config 2025 early bird tickets go on sale tomorrow. if anyone wants to go, let me know and I'll get approval for the team budget
anyone want to grab coffee? I'm doing a starbucks run in 10 min
oat milk latte please! I'll venmo you
same for me please, medium drip. thanks charlie!
sofia do you have the zoom link for the all-hands tomorrow? I can't find the calendar invite
just forwarded it to you. it's the same recurring link we always use — I'll pin it in #general too
grace have you ever tried that korean bbq place near the office? a bunch of us are going friday after work
oh I love that place! count me in. who else is going?
so far it's me, lisa, oscar, and frank. the more the merrier though — invite whoever
shout out to the eng team for crushing it on the year-end deploy. zero incidents over the holiday break. that's how it's done 🙌
charlie do you have a good recommendation for a mechanical keyboard? mine is dying and I need a new one
keychron Q1 pro, hands down. I've been using it for 6 months and it's amazing. brown switches if you're in the office so you don't annoy everyone lol
happy birthday lisa!! 🎂🎉 there's cake in the kitchen if anyone wants some
happy birthday @lisa_chen! hope it's a great one 🥳
aw thanks everyone!! you guys are the best. the cake is delicious btw, who made it??
ugh my commute was an hour and a half today. there was some kind of accident on the bridge. I should just WFH on mondays honestly
that's brutal. I switched to taking the train last month and it's been way more consistent. highly recommend if you're near a station
heads up I'm WFH today, the snow is pretty bad on my side of town. ping me on slack if you need anything
hey grace, quick question — where do I submit my expense reports? I couldn't find the link on the intranet
it's under People > Expenses in workday. it's kind of buried. I'll send you the direct link — I had the same issue when I started lol
PSA: the espresso machine in the 2nd floor kitchen is broken again. someone left it on over the weekend and it overheated. IT said they're getting it fixed tomorrow
nooo that espresso machine is the only thing keeping me alive this week 😭
priya have you watched severance season 2? I just binged it this weekend and I can't stop thinking about it
YES. the finale was unreal. I literally gasped. no spoilers in #general though, quinn hasn't started it yet and he'll kill us
reminder: product team lunch is this thursday at 12:30. we're doing that new mediterranean place. please RSVP on the calendar invite so I can make a reservation
yo frank you still down for the gym after work? I found a good chest/back split I want to try
let's go. I'll meet you in the lobby at 6:15. also I finally got a PR on bench press last week 💪
anyone interested in starting a book club? I've been reading a lot of non-fiction lately and it'd be fun to discuss with people. thinking once a month
I'm in! I've been meaning to read more this year. great idea iris
count me in too! I just finished "the staff engineer's path" and need something new
dave did you end up getting that keychron? I saw one on your desk today
yeah charlie convinced me. it's really nice actually, the build quality is solid. only downside is I keep bottoming out on the keys because my old keyboard had way heavier switches
FYI the VPN will be down for maintenance this saturday 6am-10am ET. plan accordingly if you were going to work over the weekend
jack nice work on the user research presentation yesterday. the stakeholders were really impressed, priya told me after
thanks oscar, that means a lot. I was nervous about presenting to the execs but I think the data spoke for itself. glad it landed well
alice I'm going to be about 10 min late to standup, my morning meeting is running over. can you cover for me if anything comes up?
got you, no worries. I'll let the team know
who left a bag of chips in the microwave? it's been in there since yesterday and the kitchen smells like a movie theater 😂
dave you're into camping right? any recs for a good 2-person tent? my girlfriend and I are planning a trip to joshua tree next month
nice! big agnes copper spur is the gold standard. a bit pricey but totally worth it. also make sure you bring layers — the desert gets cold at night. I can send you my packing list if you want
found an amazing talk from the latest RISD conference about designing with constraints. highly recommend watching if you have 20 min: https://example.com/risd-talk
eve have you tried that new boba place that opened up next to the subway station? I went yesterday and it's SO good
no omg we need to go!! I've been craving boba all week. tomorrow afternoon?
anyone else having issues with npm install being super slow today? it's been hanging for like 5 minutes
yeah it's not just you. npmjs.org status page says they're having registry issues. should clear up soon hopefully
reminder: company all-hands is tomorrow at 2pm ET. agenda includes Q1 OKR review and a few exciting announcements. please try to attend live if you can!
great all-hands today. nice to see the company growing. also whoever asked that question about unlimited PTO — you're brave 😄
quinn I'm going to work from the coffee shop downtown this afternoon. I'll be online on slack but might be slow to respond if the wifi is spotty
anyone want to do a lunch run to the thai place on elm street? I'm ordering in 15 min
pad see ew for me please! large. venmo incoming
green curry with tofu please. thanks alice!
alice the joshua tree trip was amazing. thanks for the restaurant rec near palm springs too — that brunch spot was incredible
PSA: daylight saving time this weekend! don't forget to spring forward or you'll miss monday standup 😅
mike can you send me the link to the eng retro doc? I want to add a few notes before tomorrow's meeting
just saw that the office is getting new standing desks next week. finally! my back has been killing me
anyone else's IDE been crashing every 30 minutes since the latest update? might need to roll back
yeah I had the same issue. downgrading to the previous version fixed it for me. they pushed a patch this morning though so try updating again
jack have you seen the cherry blossoms by the waterfront yet? they're starting to bloom and they're gorgeous this year. perfect for a walk at lunch
hey henry, thanks for the onboarding help last week. really appreciate you taking the time to walk me through the codebase. the team has been super welcoming
heads up I'm going to be OOO next friday for a friend's wedding. I'll make sure everything is handed off before then
bob did you fix the coffee machine on the 2nd floor? it's magically working again and I need to thank whoever did it
lol yeah I watched a youtube video and figured it out. the water line was just clogged. you're welcome 😄
iris omg I just finished the book club pick — "creative confidence" by the kelley brothers. SO good. can't wait to discuss it next week
ryan are you going to the happy hour tonight? I heard they're doing it at that rooftop bar downtown
yeah I'll be there! should be a good time. I think priya and sofia are coming too
grace how was the wedding? I saw your photos on instagram — that venue was stunning!
wrapping up Q1 next week! let's finish strong everyone. really proud of what this team has accomplished these past few months. beers on me friday 🍻
